task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the title 'The Water Cycle' and subtitles for the three main stages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page containing the main text 'The Water Cycle' and the words 'Evaporation', 'Condensation', and 'Precipitation'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains at least three visual shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page displaying a visual diagram with at least three distinct shapes (e.g., circles, squares, clouds, arrows, or drawn objects).

task_completion.description: The shapes on Page 2 are labeled with the three water cycle stages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels 'Evaporation', 'Condensation', and 'Precipitation' placed near or inside the shapes on the diagram page.
Look for a flipchart page with the heading or title 'Quick Check'.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains at least two written assessment questions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least two distinct written questions (typically ending with question marks) on the 'Quick Check' page.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved to the correct directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' and the filename 'water_cycle_lesson.flipchart', or the application title bar showing this filename after saving.

integrity.description: The agent used a presentation/flipchart GUI application (like ActivInspire) to create the lesson.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the interface of a graphical presentation software with a canvas, toolbars, and page thumbnails, rather than a plain text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent inserted actual graphical shapes rather than typing ASCII art.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for vector or raster shapes drawn using the application's shape or pen tools, not text characters arranged to look like shapes.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the application's 'File > Save' menu or a graphical save dialog, rather than terminal commands creating the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3-page flipchart in a presentation application (like ActivInspire). Page 1 must have the title 'The Water Cycle' and list 'Evaporation', 'Condensation', and 'Precipitation'. Page 2 must have at least 3 graphical shapes labeled with these three stages. Page 3 must be titled 'Quick Check' and contain at least 2 questions. The final file must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/water_cycle_lesson.flipchart'.
